idea-plugin.name: Builder Builder
idea-plugin.description:
Generates a nested Builder class for a Java class's fields. Available from the Code > Generate menu (Alt+Insert), right below toString().

Features:

  • Choose exactly which fields the builder should expose, via a field chooser dialog.
  • If the class already has a constructor matching the selected fields, the builder calls it instead of assigning fields directly. Works with immutable classes and private constructors.
  • Configurable setter method prefix (defaults to with, e.g. withName(...)).
  • Optional static builder() factory method.
  • but() method on the builder for creating modified copies.
  • Optional JSpecify @Nullable annotations, with null-checks for required fields thrown as IllegalStateException in build().
  • Fields already marked @Deprecated get a @Deprecated setter.

Defaults for all options can be configured under Settings/Preferences > Tools > Builder Builder.
idea-plugin.change-notes:
• 1.1.1: Added missing plugin logo
  • 1.1.0: The Builder now has a private constructor and JSpecify annotations are now placed before the type.
  • 1.0.0: Initial release: Generate Builder action with field selection, configurable method prefix, optional but() and builder() methods, JSpecify null-safety support, and application-level default settings.

action.description: Generates a Builder inner class for this class's fields
